-forcing()
+forcing_old()
 {
     xx = grid_position()
     cs  = AC_cs_sound
@@ -442,6 +442,27 @@ forcing()
 
     return force
 }
+
+forcing() {
+    f0 = AC_forcing_magnitude
+    cs = AC_cs_sound
+    dt = AC_dt
+    kaver = AC_kaver
+    N = f0 * cs * sqrt(kaver * cs / dt)
+
+    phi   = AC_forcing_phase
+    k     = real3(AC_k_forcex,   AC_k_forcey,   AC_k_forcez  )
+    f_k_re = real3(AC_ff_hel_rex, AC_ff_hel_rey, AC_ff_hel_rez)
+    f_k_im = real3(AC_ff_hel_imx, AC_ff_hel_imy, AC_ff_hel_imz)
+
+    x = grid_position()
+
+    f = N * (f_k_re * cos(dot(k, x)) * cos(phi) -
+            f_k_re * sin(dot(k, x)) * sin(phi) -
+            f_k_im * cos(dot(k, x)) * sin(phi) -
+            f_k_im * cos(phi) * sin(dot(k, x)))
+    return f * dt
+}
 #endif // LFORCING
 
 continuity() {
